metadata.name: fairx_vault_v4
metadata.description: Isolated fixed-payout FairX vault prototype for the France-Morocco TxLINE replay

errors.name: InvalidBootstrapAdmin
errors.msg: Signer is not the compiled V4 bootstrap administrator

errors.name: UnsupportedFixture
errors.msg: This isolated prototype supports only France-Morocco fixture 18209181

errors.name: InvalidInitialSequence
errors.msg: The initial replay sequence must be the genuine pre-goal sequence 738

errors.name: UnsupportedReplaySequence
errors.msg: The replay supports only the committed goal and final sequences

errors.name: ZeroHash
errors.msg: A required commitment hash is zero

errors.name: CanonicalIdentityMismatch
errors.msg: Market identity does not match the canonical France-Morocco replay

errors.name: CanonicalOrientationMismatch
errors.msg: Participant identity or home-away orientation is not canonical

errors.name: InvalidAuthority
errors.msg: Authority is invalid

errors.name: DuplicateAuthority
errors.msg: Authority roles must be distinct

errors.name: InvalidResolutionThreshold
errors.msg: The resolution threshold must be exactly two

errors.name: InvalidOperator
errors.msg: Operator signer does not match the authority configuration

errors.name: InvalidPricingAuthority
errors.msg: Pricing signer does not match the authority configuration

errors.name: InvalidFeedAuthority
errors.msg: Feed signer does not match the authority configuration

errors.name: InvalidResolutionAuthority
errors.msg: Signer is not a resolution authority

errors.name: AccountSubstitution
errors.msg: An account belongs to another market, vault, or proposal

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be positive

errors.name: InvalidStake
errors.msg: Stake is outside the configured bounds

errors.name: InvalidSide
errors.msg: Side must be YES or NO

errors.name: TradingClosed
errors.msg: Trading is closed

errors.name: QuoteSequenceRegression
errors.msg: Quote sequence must strictly increase

errors.name: QuoteSequenceMismatch
errors.msg: Signed quote sequence does not match current quote

errors.name: QuotePayloadMismatch
errors.msg: Quote payload does not match the committed TxLINE record

errors.name: RecordedQuoteMismatch
errors.msg: Quote does not match the canonical recorded France-Morocco StablePrice record

errors.name: RecordedQuoteNotNewerThanEvent
errors.msg: Post-event quote is not genuinely newer than the material event

errors.name: MaterialSequenceMismatch
errors.msg: Quote material-event sequence does not match the market

errors.name: InvalidReplaySpread
errors.msg: The isolated replay uses a fixed 10,000-micro additive spread

errors.name: MaterialSequenceRegression
errors.msg: Material-event sequence must strictly increase

errors.name: InvalidReplayEvent
errors.msg: The material event does not match the recorded France goal payload

errors.name: FutureMaterialSequence
errors.msg: An order cannot reference a future material-event sequence

errors.name: StaleQuote
errors.msg: The quote is stale

errors.name: QuoteNotVerified
errors.msg: The quote has not passed direct TxLINE CPI validation

errors.name: ExecutionPriceMismatch
errors.msg: The wallet-signed execution price differs from the market

errors.name: OrderExpired
errors.msg: Order expired

errors.name: OrderNonceMismatch
errors.msg: Order nonce does not match the vault's next persistent nonce

errors.name: FixtureMismatch
errors.msg: TxLINE odds fixture does not match the market

errors.name: InvalidOddsSource
errors.msg: TxLINE bookmaker is not StablePriceDemargined

errors.name: InvalidOddsMarket
errors.msg: TxLINE odds market is not full-time 1X2

errors.name: InvalidOddsPrices
errors.msg: TxLINE raw prices are invalid

errors.name: InvalidExecutionPrice
errors.msg: Execution price must be strictly between zero and one

errors.name: InsufficientFreeCollateral
errors.msg: Free collateral is insufficient

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow or underflow

errors.name: VaultInvariantViolation
errors.msg: Vault accounting invariant failed

errors.name: InsufficientVaultLamports
errors.msg: Vault account does not have enough spendable lamports

errors.name: PositionAccountingMismatch
errors.msg: Position accounting does not match stake plus liability

errors.name: InvalidTimestamp
errors.msg: Timestamp is invalid

errors.name: InvalidTxlineRoot
errors.msg: TxLINE root is not the canonical PDA owned by the fixed program

errors.name: InvalidTxlineProgram
errors.msg: TxLINE executable program is invalid

errors.name: TxlineSerializationFailed
errors.msg: TxLINE instruction serialization failed

errors.name: TxlineReturnMissing
errors.msg: TxLINE CPI did not return data

errors.name: TxlineValidationFailed
errors.msg: TxLINE CPI did not return true

errors.name: InvalidFinalStats
errors.msg: Final proof must contain exactly the four regulation-time stat keys

errors.name: InvalidFinalPeriod
errors.msg: Every final regulation-time stat must use TxLINE period 100

errors.name: InvalidFinalTimestamp
errors.msg: Final proof timestamp does not match the recorded game-finalised update

errors.name: MarketAlreadyResolved
errors.msg: Market is already resolved

errors.name: MarketNotResolved
errors.msg: Market is not resolved

errors.name: ValidResolutionAlreadyCommitted
errors.msg: A valid final TxLINE resolution receipt is already committed

errors.name: VoidNotYetAvailable
errors.msg: VOID is not available until the hard stop and oracle grace period elapse

errors.name: InvalidVoidReason
errors.msg: VOID reason code is not supported by this canonical replay

errors.name: MarketNotVoid
errors.msg: Market did not resolve VOID

errors.name: VoidPositionMustRefund
errors.msg: VOID positions must refund principal rather than claim or reconcile

errors.name: PositionNotRefundable
errors.msg: Position principal is not refundable

errors.name: ProposalAlreadyExecuted
errors.msg: Resolution proposal already executed

errors.name: DuplicateApproval
errors.msg: Resolution authority already approved

errors.name: ResolutionThresholdNotMet
errors.msg: Two resolution approvals are required

errors.name: ResolutionReceiptMismatch
errors.msg: Resolution proposal and TxLINE receipt do not match

errors.name: InvalidPositionOwner
errors.msg: Position owner signer is invalid

errors.name: InvalidRentRecipient
errors.msg: Position rent recipient is invalid

errors.name: PositionNotClaimable
errors.msg: Position cannot claim

errors.name: PositionDidNotWin
errors.msg: Position is not on the winning side

errors.name: PositionNotReconcileable
errors.msg: Position cannot be reconciled

errors.name: WinningPositionMustClaim
errors.msg: Winning positions must claim rather than reconcile

errors.name: PositionNotClosable
errors.msg: Only refunded, claimed, losing, or void-refunded positions can close
